fields.summary: Specifies the opto-electronic transfer function (OETF) of a color space as defined by the CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) standard ITU-T H.273.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp` enumerates the standardized transfer functions from
ITU-T H.273. Each member corresponds to a numeric code point assigned by that
standard. Pass a value of this enum alongside an
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp> to
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp*> to construct an
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace> from CICP metadata embedded in image files (for
example, AVIF or HEIC).

## Examples

```csharp
// Create an HDR PQ color space from CICP metadata
var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(
    SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec2020,
    SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Pq);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Hybrid Log-Gamma (HLG) transfer function, used for HDR broadcast (CICP code point 18).
IEC 61966-2-1 transfer function, which defines the standard sRGB electro-optical transfer function (CICP code point 13).
Linear (no gamma) transfer function (CICP code point 8).
Perceptual Quantizer (PQ / SMPTE ST 2084) transfer function, used for HDR displays (CICP code point 16).
ITU-R BT.2020 10-bit transfer function (CICP code point 14).
ITU-R BT.2020 12-bit transfer function (CICP code point 15).
ITU-R BT.470 System B/G transfer function, assumed display gamma (CICP code point 5).
ITU-R BT.470 System M transfer function, assumed display gamma (CICP code point 4).
ITU-R BT.601 transfer function, used for standard definition television (CICP code point 6).
ITU-R BT.709 transfer function, used for high-definition television (CICP code point 1).
SMPTE ST 240 transfer function (CICP code point 7).
SMPTE ST 428-1 transfer function, used for digital cinema (CICP code point 17).
Unknown or unspecified transfer function (CICP code point 0).
